name: Ullipaya Pakodi

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp hot oil, for the batter

steps: Squeeze the sliced onions with salt until they wilt and release moisture.
Add besan, rice flour, chillies, chilli powder, curry leaves and hot oil — bind using only the onion juices.
Sprinkle water just if needed; the mix should stay ragged, not a batter.
Drop rough clusters into hot oil and fry until deep golden and crisp.
Drain and serve immediately with tea — crunchiest while hot.
